flyHorizontalBrakeMPSS.Wiki: Braking when exceeding the maximum airborne horizontal speed, in m/s^2

flyVerticalBrakeMPSS.Wiki: Braking when exceeding the maximum airborne vertical speed, in m/s^2

realVelocityFeedBackRate.Wiki: The smaller this value, the greater the sense of weight.

damageBrake_BeginToPeakTimeSec.Wiki: Time from damage brake start to end, in seconds.

damageBrake_TimerResetDelayTime.Wiki: Time from when knockback speed reaches 0 until the damage brake timer resets.

minAnimMoveAccelMPSS.Wiki: Minimum garaunteed acceleration during movement animation, in m/s^2

SlowBrakeAnimKMPH.Wiki: Switches to slow-speed braking when the horizontal speed is below this value.

blowDeadBrake_BeginToPeakTimeSec.Wiki: Time from blow dead brake start to end, in seconds.

blowDeadBrake_TimerResetDelayTime.Wiki: Time from when knockback speed reaches 0 until the blow dead brake timer resets.
